category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU C++ runtime library for threads, sockets, and parsing; official GNU page documents GNU uCommon C++.
display_name_sources: Official GNU Common C++ page names the project GNU uCommon C++; source_facts.name is ucommon.
docs_sources: Official GNU Common C++ page includes introduction, features, documentation, support, and resources for uCommon.
repo_sources: Official GNU page says source repositories are available through the GNU Commoncpp project at Savannah; Savannah cgit hosts commoncpp.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page describe uCommon as a C++ library for threads, sockets, XML parsing, serialization, and config files.
